estimated.note: Higher estimate includes unreported deaths in restricted areas
Slight variance due to delayed military casualty reports
Wide range: HRANA says 7,015; Iranian doctors network says 16,500-18,000; Iran International estimates up to 36,500. Trump cited 32,000 in State of the Union.
Includes UAE (3), Kuwait (4+), Bahrain, other GCC nations. 112+ wounded in UAE alone.

confirmed.source: Iranian deputy health minister (as of March 11). Toll includes 40+ killed in eastern Tehran residential buildings, 5 in Arak. Minab school toll 180. Iran's 37th wave launched with super-heavy Khoramshahr missiles.

estimated.note: Hengaw reports 4,300+ killed as of March 11 — triple the government's 1,380 figure. HRANA estimates 7,000+. Includes 180 at Minab girls' school, 4 oil workers. 65 schools and 32 medical facilities damaged. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged. 5,000+ targets struck (CENTCOM confirmed). 101 sailors missing from IRINS Dena. Internet at 4% — independent verification nearly impossible. ~40 officials killed including Armed Forces CoS Bagheri, IRGC commanders Salami, Rashid, Hajizadeh.

rumored.note: Social media reports suggest far higher tolls, especially from strikes on military bases where access is restricted. Human rights orgs estimate 2,400+ total killed.

socialSources.claim: Eyewitness videos from Kerman show at least 12 buildings destroyed — local hospital overwhelmed with 400+ casualties in one night
Satellite imagery of Bandar Abbas naval base shows 8 destroyed structures — Iran only confirmed 15 KIA there. Real toll likely 200+
Leaked hospital records from Isfahan show 1,200 admitted in 48 hours — officials claim only 89 casualties in the city
IRINS Dena sinking alone could account for 100+ dead — only 79 of 180 crew recovered. Iran lists them as 'missing'

estimated.note: 9 confirmed killed in Beit Shemesh missile strike. 2 killed by cluster munition strike in central Israel. Iran has fired ~300 missiles at Israel — about half with cluster bomb warheads (banned under 2008 Convention). 186 total attack waves against Israel since war began.

rumored.note: Iranian state media claims significantly higher Israeli casualties; some OSINT analysts report additional unreported incidents

socialSources.claim: Multiple videos show direct hits on residential areas in southern Tel Aviv not covered by Israeli media — possible casualties suppressed by censorship
IRGC claims 40+ Israelis killed across 9 missile salvos — IDF only confirming 12

estimated.source: Unconfirmed reports of additional casualties at Gulf bases
estimated.note: 8 confirmed KIA including Sgt. Benjamin Pennington, 26, of Kentucky. ~140 wounded (108 returned to duty, 8 severely injured). Additional casualties reported but not confirmed.

rumored.note: Iran claims to have captured US soldiers; IRGC media reports higher US casualty figures than Pentagon confirms. Fox29 reports ~140 total wounded.

socialSources.claim: Iran state TV broadcast what it says are captured US soldiers — Pentagon denies. Ali Larijani says US is 'concealing captures'
Sources in Bahrain report 12+ additional US wounded at 5th Fleet HQ not in official Pentagon count

confirmed.source: Lebanese Health Ministry (as of March 12). Includes 91 children, 15 healthcare workers. Aisha Bakkar apartment strike + Ramlet al-Baida seafront strike (7 killed).

estimated.source: Lebanese media and Hezbollah casualty estimates
estimated.note: Hezbollah intel chief Hussein Makled confirmed killed. 816,000+ registered displaced across Lebanon (126K in collective shelters). IDF conducting ground operations in border areas. 15 healthcare workers killed. Israel struck central Beirut apartment (Aisha Bakkar) and seafront (Ramlet al-Baida). IDF preparing ground invasion into Lebanon.

confirmed.source: Gulf state media reports / defense ministry statements

estimated.source: Estimated from missile impact reports across Gulf
estimated.note: UAE: 6 killed, 122 injured, 262 missiles detected (241 destroyed), ~1,400 drones intercepted. Kuwait: 11 killed. Bahrain: 1 killed (+ 32 wounded), 105 ballistic missiles and 176 drones intercepted since war began. Saudi Arabia: 2 killed. Oman: 3 killed.
